name: Claude Code for DCYFR
description: First-class DCYFR workspace integration for Claude Code. Adds agent palette, delegation shortcuts, OpenSpec command runner, and status-line workspace health indicator.

name: DCYFR Workspace Status
description: Real-time workspace health in your VS Code status bar. Shows Intelligence Gateway connectivity, active OpenSpec changes, worktree isolation status, and TLP classification of open files.

name: DCYFR Snippet Runner
description: Run dcyfr.codes snippets directly in VS Code. Browse the snippet library, preview code, and insert with one click. Supports delegation-contract-basic, rag-pipeline-basic, and all published patterns.

name: OpenSpec Workflow
description: OpenSpec change management inside VS Code. Create, continue, verify, and archive OpenSpec changes without leaving your editor. Artifact autocomplete and TLP label enforcement built in.

name: TLP Classification Labels
description: Traffic Light Protocol labels for VS Code. Automatically detects TLP frontmatter in markdown files and shows a colored status-bar indicator. Warns before pasting AMBER/RED content into untrusted windows.

name: DCYFR Dark Theme
description: Official DCYFR dark color theme. Indigo/slate primary palette, consistent with dcyfr.work design tokens. WCAG AA contrast verified across all foreground/background combinations.
